name: Great Gratin of Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Yukon Gold or russet potatoes (peeled and cut into 1/16 to 1/8-inch slices)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub an oval gratin dish or a rectangular (14 x 8 inches) 2-quart gratin dish with garlic.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Slice the potatoes into slices no thicker than 1/16 to 1/8 inch. Build up three layers in the gratin dish, overlapping the potato slices for the first layer. Sprinkle with half a teaspoon of salt, pepper, and half of the cheese. Drizzle with cream and dot with one tablespoon of butter.
4. Repeat with more potatoes, cheese, cream, salt, pepper, and butter.
5. For the last layer, sprinkle with butter but no cheese.
6. Pour chicken broth over the top.
7. Bake for 1 1/2 hours, basting the potatoes during the middle of the baking time with any accumulated liquid in the bottom of the gratin dish.
